## 2025-03-14 - C2PA Metadata Overhead in WebP
**Learning:** WebP images generated by AI tools (like DALL-E) can contain significant C2PA metadata chunks (often >100KB) that are not required for rendering and significantly increase file size and load time. Stripping these RIFF chunks is 100% lossless.
**Action:** Always check for `C2PA` chunks in WebP assets and strip them if they don't serve a specific legal or provenance requirement in the context of the application.
